subcodes.first_line: Forget not the remembrance of God and His Covenant. Verily, He is with thee and shall aid thee in all circumstances. Turn thou unto God and be thou detached [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: لا تنس ذکر الله و عهده انه معک و ینصرک فی کل الاحوال ان اقبل الی الله و انقطع
subcodes.subjects: @suffering and imprisonment, @detachment; severance; renunciation; patience, @steadfastness; perseverance; faithfulness, @trust and reliance in God; turning to Him at all times
